## About Sylvan Tributary

Welcome to Resia Tributary, a brand-new apartment community in the heart of Douglasville, Georgia! Ideally situated just minutes from Interstate 20, commuting to Atlanta or surrounding cities has never been easier. Enjoy the convenience of being close to a variety of shopping and dining destinations, including the Arbor Place Mall and Douglasville Marketplace.At Resia Tributary, outdoor enthusiasts will appreciate easy access to recreational spaces like the Douglas County Dog Park, Douglasville City Park, and the renowned Silver Comet Trail a 61.5-mile paved rail trail perfect for walking, biking, and running.This thoughtfully designed community offers spacious floor plans that provide both comfort and convenience, while its serene setting away from the hustle and bustle creates the perfect retreat to call home. Experience the perfect blend of modern living and easy access to everything you need at Resia Tributary!

Sylvan Tributary is an apartment community located in [Douglas County](https://www.apartments.com/douglas-county-ga/) and the [30135](https://www.apartments.com/douglasville-ga-30135/) ZIP Code. This area is served by the [Douglas County School District](https://www.apartments.com/school-districts/ga/douglas-county-school-district/qswvg0z/) attendance zone.

City - Douglasville

Located 20 miles west of Atlanta, Douglasville combines suburban living with historic charm. The downtown district, listed on the National Register of Historic Places, showcases Romanesque, Italianate, and Queen Anne architecture alongside local shops and restaurants. Housing options include apartment communities near Arbor Place Mall and residential properties throughout established neighborhoods. Current market data shows average rents of $1,271 for one-bedroom units. The rental market reflects varying trends, with one and two-bedroom units seeing decreases of 7.2% and 3.9% respectively over the past year, while three and four-bedroom homes show modest increases.

Douglasville's Hunter Park features an 18-hole disc golf course and athletic facilities. Sweetwater Creek State Park, 7 miles east of downtown, offers 9 miles of hiking trails and a 215-acre lake for fishing and canoeing.

[Learn more about living in Douglasville](https://www.apartments.com/local-guide/douglasville-ga/ "Douglasville Overview")

Frequently Asked Questions

Does Sylvan Tributary have in-unit laundry?

Sylvan Tributary does not offer in-unit laundry or shared facilities. Please contact the property to learn about nearby laundry options.

What utilities are included in rent at Sylvan Tributary?

Utilities are not included in rent. Residents should plan to set up and pay for all services separately.

Is parking available at Sylvan Tributary?

Contact this property for parking details.

Which floor plans are available, and what are the price ranges?

Sylvan Tributary has one to two-bedrooms with rent ranges from $1,304/mo. to $1,774/mo.

Is Sylvan Tributary pet-friendly?

Yes, Sylvan Tributary welcomes pets. Breed restrictions, weight limits, and additional fees may apply. View this property's [pet policy](https://www.apartments.com/sylvan-tributary-douglasville-ga/tpys53c/#feesSection).

How much income do I need to rent at Sylvan Tributary?

A good rule of thumb is to spend no more than 30% of your gross income on rent. Based on the lowest available rent of $1,304 for a one-bedroom, you would need to earn about $52,160 per year to qualify. Want to double-check your budget? Calculate how much rent you can afford with our [Rent Affordability Calculator](https://www.apartments.com/rent-affordability-calculator/).

Does Sylvan Tributary have move-in specials?

Sylvan Tributary is offering Specials for eligible applicants, with rental rates starting at $1,304.

Does Sylvan Tributary offer Matterport 3D tours?

Yes! Sylvan Tributary offers 4 [Matterport 3D Tours](https://www.apartments.com/sylvan-tributary-douglasville-ga/tpys53c/#matterport3dSection). Explore different floor plans and see unit level details, all without leaving home.

###### CHEAP APARTMENTS IN ANNEEWAKEE ESTATES DOUGLASVILLE

Looking for a cheap apartment in Anneewakee Estates Douglasville? Act quickly; affordable apartments in Anneewakee Estates Douglasville exist but don’t stay on the market for long.

When shopping for a cheap apartment, it’s important to establish your list of must-have features before beginning. Stay flexible during the rental shopping process as you may have to sacrifice certain amenities to meet your budget. You could find an apartment that fits your budget, but it might lack square footage. Or you might find an apartment in the perfect neighborhood, but may have to buy all of your appliances. Stay open-minded. Reflect on the features that matter most to compromise on an apartment without overspending.

###### FINDING A CHEAP APARTMENT IN ANNEEWAKEE ESTATES DOUGLASVILLE

Hunting for a cheap apartment off-season may increase your chances to land a lease. Try to look for a new apartment in the winter months: December, January or February. You can find better deals on your unit in winter because supply is typically greater than demand and landlords advertise reduced rate apartment contracts to attract renters. As a renter in the off-season, you may be able to negotiate with your landlord and cut a deal. Landlords might offer to waive your monthly parking, provide a storage unit at no cost or include all your utilities in the monthly rent.

Cheap apartments tend to be more competitive because no one wants to spend more than they have to on rent. Do your homework, prepare all the paperwork before going to the showings and be sure to make a professional first impression.

## About The Strand at Lenox

The Strand at Lenox is a premier community where you can live the way youve always wanted. Boasting captivating amenities, elegant interiors, and five-star services, our apartments in Buckhead were designed with your needs in mind. Add to this the well-connected location that puts you near the citys hotspots, and you wont miss out on anything.

The Strand at Lenox is an apartment community located in [Fulton County](https://www.apartments.com/fulton-county-ga/) and the [30324](https://www.apartments.com/atlanta-ga-30324/) ZIP Code. This area is served by the [Dekalb County School District](https://www.apartments.com/school-districts/ga/dekalb-county-school-district/6jxh7bs/) attendance zone.

Neighborhood

Located directly north of Midtown, Buckhead is known for being Atlanta’s upscale financial district. The neighborhood is teeming with historic mansions, soaring skyscrapers, upscale shops, and top-rated restaurants, which are all nestled along densely tree-lined streets. With its mix of high-rise apartment buildings and office headquarters, Buckhead affords many residents walkable access to their workplaces. For the residents not within walking distance of work, the high-speed MARTA train boasts several stops in the community on the Red and Gold lines, along with easy access to the Georgia 400 Highway.

Buckhead sits near beautiful green spaces like the Atlanta Botanical Garden, Chastain Park, and Westside Reservoir Park, placing residents within close proximity to some of Atlanta’s most popular outdoor venues. Buckhead is also convenient to Georgia Tech, Georgia State University’s J. Mack Robinson College of Business, and the University of Georgia’s Terry Executive Education Center.

[Learn more about living in Buckhead](https://www.apartments.com/local-guide/buckhead-atlanta-ga/ "Buckhead Overview")

Frequently Asked Questions

Does The Strand at Lenox have in-unit laundry?

The Strand at Lenox has units with in‑unit washers and dryers, making laundry day simple for residents.

What utilities are included in rent at The Strand at Lenox?

Utilities are not included in rent. Residents should plan to set up and pay for all services separately.

Is parking available at The Strand at Lenox?

Contact this property for parking details.

Which floor plans are available, and what are the price ranges?

The Strand at Lenox has studios to three-bedrooms with rent ranges from $1,200/mo. to $3,463/mo.

Is The Strand at Lenox pet-friendly?

Yes, The Strand at Lenox welcomes pets. Breed restrictions, weight limits, and additional fees may apply. View this property's [pet policy](https://www.apartments.com/the-strand-at-lenox-atlanta-ga/jkyzsz4/#feesSection).

How much income do I need to rent at The Strand at Lenox?

A good rule of thumb is to spend no more than 30% of your gross income on rent. Based on the lowest available rent of $1,200 for a studio, you would need to earn about $48,000 per year to qualify. Want to double-check your budget? Calculate how much rent you can afford with our [Rent Affordability Calculator](https://www.apartments.com/rent-affordability-calculator/).

Does The Strand at Lenox have move-in specials?

The Strand at Lenox is offering Specials for eligible applicants, with rental rates starting at $1,200.

Does The Strand at Lenox offer Matterport 3D tours?

Yes! The Strand at Lenox offers 6 [Matterport 3D Tours](https://www.apartments.com/the-strand-at-lenox-atlanta-ga/jkyzsz4/#matterport3dSection). Explore different floor plans and see unit level details, all without leaving home.

## About Buckhead 960

Put yourself in the epicenter of Atlantas most famous urban playground, home to the citys exquisite shops, restaurants and exciting nightlife. Step out of your door to catch Marta explore all that Buckhead & Atlanta have to offer. Work or play you are just minutes from Hartsfield-Jackson International Airport, Mercedes Benz Stadium, Philips Arena, the Fox Theater or Atlantic Station. Experience Atlantas finest shopping or dining at Phipps Plaza, Lenox Square and Buckhead Village District.

Buckhead 960 is an apartment community located in [Fulton County](https://www.apartments.com/fulton-county-ga/) and the [30326](https://www.apartments.com/atlanta-ga-30326/) ZIP Code. This area is served by the [Atlanta Public Schools](https://www.apartments.com/school-districts/ga/atlanta-public-schools/v8sqfxg/) attendance zone.

Neighborhood

Situated between Lenox and North Buckhead is the luxury community of Buckhead Heights. Known for its high-rise apartments, modern interiors, and luxury amenities, this neighborhood is the top choice for renters interested in an upscale, urban neighborhood. Residents of Buckhead Heights have immediate access to both Lenox Square Mall and Phipps Plaza.

Between department stores, specialty shops, luxury retailers, and top-notch eateries, these popular shopping destinations have everything you could ever need. If not, Buckhead Station is just a few miles west of town on the other side of GA-400. Buckhead Heights is situated in a busy commercial area where there are an abundance of office buildings. Peachtree Road and GA-400 help commuters in the area, along with the Lenox Transit Station.

[Learn more about living in Buckhead Heights](https://www.apartments.com/local-guide/buckhead-heights-atlanta-ga/ "Buckhead Heights Overview")

Walker's Paradise - Premier Transit Location - Bike-Friendly Area - English and Spanish Speaking Staff - Dry Cleaning Service - Media Center/Movie Theatre - Roof Terrace - Walk-In Closets - Office ## About The Ludlow Family owned and operated by Edison Properties, LLC, The Ludlow, located on the Lower East Side at 188 Ludlow Street, between Houston and Stanton Streets, on the Lower East Side, contains 243 residential apartments spanning 23 stories. Completed in 2007, the building’s amenities include a residents' lounge and billiards room, fitness center and yoga studio, concierge, state-of-the-art security system, and building-wide wireless internet system. The building also houses a mini storage location. Our luxury rental apartment tower at 188 Ludlow St. on the Lower East Side of New York City features floor-to-ceiling windows, spectacular views, light oak hardwood floors, and modern kitchens with stainless-steel appliances and granite countertops. Building amenities include 24-hour doorman, valet services, wireless internet capabilities, fitness center with yoga/Pilates studio, rooftop sundeck, and media/billiards lounge. Studio, one bedroom, and two bedroom homes are available. The Ludlow is an apartment community located in [New York County](https://www.apartments.com/new-york-county-ny/) and the [10002](https://www.apartments.com/new-york-ny-10002/) ZIP Code. This area is served by the [New York City Geographic District # 1](https://www.apartments.com/school-districts/ny/new-york-city-geographic-district-1/2mz83wc/) attendance zone. $3,502\\ \\ \\ \\ Studio - 2 Beds](https://www.apartments.com/moda-jamaica-ny/kl2p7vb/) [All Apartments with Balcony](https://www.apartments.com/new-york-ny/balcony/) Location 188 Ludlow St, New York, NY10002 [Get Directions](https://www.google.com/maps/dir//188+Ludlow+St+New+York+NY+10002 "Directions") Neighborhood The Lower East Side, sometimes shortened to “LES,” is a vibrant neighborhood situated alongside the East River in Manhattan’s southeastern stretches. The Lower East Side is best known for its bustling nightlife scene anchored by an eclectic array of trendy bars and lounges. The neighborhood also contains a bevy of boutiques, cafes, independent shops, and restaurants. The rental offerings in LES are just as diverse as its welcoming community. Lower East Side apartments range from renovated pre-war walk-ups to new luxury high-rises. LES is also home to exciting music venues like Bowery Ballroom and Rockwood Music Hall as well as scenic parks like John V. Lindsay East River Park and Sara D. Roosevelt Park. This longstanding Manhattan neighborhood honors the past while acknowledging its effect on the present with its famous Tenement Museum, where residents and visitors alike can learn more about the rich history of the immigrant and migrant experience in the Lower East Side. $6,000 | ## What's special Floor-to-ceiling windowsRooftop sundeckOpen kitchensLuxury high-riseSweeping city views Set in the heart of Manhattans Lower East Side, The Ludlow offers a refined residential experience shaped by creativity, culture, and connection. This luxury high-rise features thoughtfully designed studio, one-bedroom, one-bedroom flex, and two-bedroom residences with floor-to-ceiling windows, open kitchens, and sweeping city views. Residents enjoy a curated collection of amenities including a rooftop sundeck, fitness and yoga studios, resident lounges, and concierge services. Surrounded by renowned dining, music venues, galleries, and neighborhood landmarks, The Ludlow delivers authentic New York living with modern comfort and style. Powered By [Travel Time](http://www.traveltime.com/) ClearSave City - River Edge Nestled alongside the Hackensack River, River Edge is a picturesque borough in Bergen County. River Edge touts a true suburban atmosphere, with tranquil neighborhoods and plenty of commercial offerings. There are a wide variety of apartments available for rent along tree-lined avenues in River Edge. Although River Edge is predominantly residential, the borough offers a slew of restaurants and shops on Kinderkamack Road. River Edge is also adjacent to fantastic shopping at the Outlets at Bergen Town Center. Opportunities for outdoor recreation abound at the neighboring Van Saun County Park, which contains a zoo, dog park, playground, and vast stretches of green space. Quick access to the Pascack Valley Line makes commuting from River Edge easy. Our community features studios, one, and three bedroom apartment homes that come furnished or unfurnished, with utilities included and professional on-site management. We are currently accepting applications for preleasing. Jackson Hole is an oasis of the west, and you'll come home each night to a quiet neighborhood in the convenience of Town Living. Your home is perfect for your all your comforts and needs. Aspen Meadows believes in giving you more--more space in your home, more freedom to explore the outdoors as your backyard, and more time to relax in quiet. You truly can have it all living in Jackson Hole, if you call Aspen Meadows today! Aspen Meadows Apartments is an apartment community located in [Teton County](https://www.apartments.com/teton-county-wy/) and the [83001](https://www.apartments.com/jackson-wy-83001/) ZIP Code. This area is served by the [Teton County School District #1](https://www.apartments.com/school-districts/wy/teton-county-school-district-1/fcblq1v/) attendance zone. Powered By [Travel Time](http://www.traveltime.com/) ClearSave City - Jackson Jackson, Wyoming sits at 6,237 feet elevation in the Teton Valley, serving as a gateway to Grand Teton National Park and Yellowstone National Park. The town's character emerges through distinctive features like the elk antler arches framing Town Square. Outdoor recreation defines daily life here, with three major ski areas - Jackson Hole Mountain Resort, Snow King Mountain, and Grand Targhee Resort - drawing winter sports enthusiasts. Summer activities center around the surrounding national parks, with hiking trails and wildlife viewing opportunities at the National Elk Refuge. The Center for the Arts and National Museum of Wildlife Art anchor the local cultural scene. The rental market includes properties throughout the area, from downtown apartments to mountain-view homes. East Jackson puts residents near Snow King Mountain's recreational areas, while West Jackson offers direct access to hiking trails and mountain vistas. May exclude fees for mandatory or optional services and usage-based utilities. ## Details ### Lease Options - 3 - 12 Month Leases - Short term lease ### Property Information - Built in 2013 - 160 units/3 stories ## Matterport 3D Tours Interior Lobby 1/4 ![](https://images1.apartments.com/i2/cPTkDDFlxVKCjg9p7ofI5YvTRpQmDZCsDk8mglBR8Y0/105/creekside-village-dupont-wa-lobby.jpg?p=1)![](https://images1.apartments.com/i2/k5gEVf78QoRTSCIAbfKVLBJ6M1i8xbpgOR0B66mQiyc/105/creekside-village-dupont-wa-fitness-center.jpg?p=1)![](https://images1.apartments.com/i2/E2KnmwF6xYLkC6lRDpsabAhyeY7IEYW5h7p3lXN0hp0/105/creekside-village-dupont-wa-lounge.jpg?p=1)![](https://images1.apartments.com/i2/G80KmLyA2NXwXhMAiNEQUE-VL4wFRBAdDTeIDiVm5_g/105/creekside-village-dupont-wa-3-br-2-ba---d1.jpg?p=1) ## About Creekside Village Welcome home to the pet-friendly Creekside Village in DuPont, Washington. Our beautiful apartment home community is located just off Interstate 5, making commuting to Tacoma simple. With easy access to Carey Theater, local parks, fine dining, great shopping, and entertainment hot spots, let us be your gateway to fun and excitement in our area. We are in the heart of DuPont, and your heart will love it here! Creekside Village is an apartment community located in [Pierce County](https://www.apartments.com/pierce-county-wa/) and the [98327](https://www.apartments.com/dupont-wa-98327/) ZIP Code. This area is served by the [Steilacoom Hist. School District](https://www.apartments.com/school-districts/wa/steilacoom-hist-school-district/h80jzb2/) attendance zone. The Joint Base Lewis-McChord serves as a major employer in the area; civilians and military personnel alike can call McChord home without being right on base. McChord is a family-friendly area with a population mostly comprised of military personnel. Though not a major urban area itself, McChord lies 11 miles south of Tacoma, and 42 miles south of Seattle.
